title: phacelurus schliebenii
intro: Phacelurus schliebenii, also known as the African spikenard, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is a climbing plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Phacelurus schliebenii include its use in treating wounds, skin conditions, and fever, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Phacelurus schliebenii can be found in the form of extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional remedies and modern supplements.
